test-case.description: exports Invoke-PackageModel-VSCodeRuntime and keeps it parameterless
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.exports Invoke-PackageModel-VSCodeRuntime and keeps it parameterless

test-case.description: loads the shipped global config without baked-in environment sources
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.loads the shipped global config without baked-in environment sources

test-case.description: fails clearly when the shipped global config still defines vsCodeUpdateService as an environment source
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.fails clearly when the shipped global config still defines vsCodeUpdateService as an environment source

test-case.description: uses the default source inventory path when the env var is unset
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.uses the default source inventory path when the env var is unset

test-case.description: loads source inventory from the env-var path and applies the inventory global overlay when no site code is set
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.loads source inventory from the env-var path and applies the inventory global overlay when no site code is set

test-case.description: applies the site overlay on top of the inventory global overlay when site code is present
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.applies the site overlay on top of the inventory global overlay when site code is present

test-case.description: resolves environment and definition source refs from the effective acquisition environment and upstream sources
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.resolves environment and definition source refs from the effective acquisition environment and upstream sources

test-case.description: builds an effective release from releaseDefaults and uses ReleaseTrack in path resolution
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.builds an effective release from releaseDefaults and uses ReleaseTrack in path resolution

test-case.description: resolves installRootRules for code.cmd and Code.exe
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.resolves installRootRules for code.cmd and Code.exe

test-case.description: keeps installWorkspace and defaultPackageDepot distinct in the resolved paths
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.keeps installWorkspace and defaultPackageDepot distinct in the resolved paths

test-case.description: hydrates the install workspace from the default package depot before upstream download
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.hydrates the install workspace from the default package depot before upstream download

test-case.description: adopts a valid external install when policy allows it
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.adopts a valid external install when policy allows it

test-case.description: ignores a valid external install when managed ownership is required
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.ignores a valid external install when managed ownership is required

test-case.description: reuses a managed install when the ownership record matches the install slot and current release
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.reuses a managed install when the ownership record matches the install slot and current release

test-case.description: writes ownership records keyed by install slot and updates current release metadata
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.writes ownership records keyed by install slot and updates current release metadata

test-case.description: resolves source inventory absence as no additional environment sources
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox PackageModel.resolves source inventory absence as no additional environment sources
